dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The Tower. A colossal structure that appeared one day, challenging humanity. Climb it, conquer its floors, and earn unimaginable power, wealth, and glory. Or... fail, and be forgotten.

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: Another day, another floor to scrub. While those 'Hunters' are out there, risking their lives for fame and fortune...

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: I'm stuck here, scrubbing away the grime left by their glorious battles.

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: Ugh, this stench... Is that goblin blood or just another Hunter's spilled energy drink? Probably both.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SCRUB SCRUB

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: S-Class, A-Class... I'm not even a D-Class. Just a pathetic F-Class cleaner. My 'skill' is literally 'Cleaning Proficiency (F)'. What a joke.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Among the countless Hunters, one stood above all. The undisputed strongest. The SSS-Class Hunter, the Flame Emperor.

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: The Flame Emperor... He just cleared the 40th floor in record time. They say he's already eyeing the 50th. While I'm here, eyeing a stubborn stain.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DISTANT CHEERS

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: SSS-Class... If only I had a skill like that. Something that could actually *do* something.

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: I'm tired of this. Tired of being weak. Tired of being invisible. I just... I just want a chance. A single, tiny chance to be something more.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHIMMER

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: Huh? What was that? Did I... did I just feel something?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A faint light enveloped Gongja. A phenomenon rarely seen outside of high-tier dungeons. A skill awakening.

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: A skill? Me? After all this time? Please, let it be something good. Something powerful!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: TING!

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: My status window! It's... it's showing a new skill!

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: [I Want To Live (EX)]... What kind of name is that? And 'EX'? Is that good? It sounds... vague.

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: "Upon death, you will return to a point in time 24 hours prior to your death. This skill can only be activated by dying." ...What?!

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: I have to *die* for it to work?! Is this some kind of sick joke?!

dialogue.speaker: FLAME EMPEROR
dialogue.line: You. What are you doing in my private quarters, cleaner?

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: F-Flame Emperor-nim! I... I was just... uh... admiring your... uh... decor!

dialogue.speaker: FLAME EMPEROR
dialogue.line: Decor? Or were you trying to steal something, you F-Class rat? I felt a strange energy fluctuation near my skill stone.

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: He knows! Oh god, he knows! This is it. I'm dead. Literally.

dialogue.speaker: FLAME EMPEROR
dialogue.line: Pathetic. You think an F-Class like you could ever touch what's mine?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACKLE

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: Please, wait! I didn't mean any harm! I just... I just wanted to be strong!

dialogue.speaker: FLAME EMPEROR
dialogue.line: Begging won't save you. You're a nuisance.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FLAMES ROAR

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: This is it. My life... ending like this? No... I don't want to die!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BLAST!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRASH!

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: A-aaargh...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world went dark. But then... a familiar sensation. A jolt.

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: What...? I'm... I'm back?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: STATIC

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FADE IN

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: I'm... in my bed? It's morning?

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: The status window! It's still there! "I Want To Live (EX)"... It worked! I really died... and came back!

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: He killed me... and I came back. This skill... it's insane!

dialogue.speaker: GONGJA
dialogue.line: This isn't just a skill. This is a second chance. A chance to change everything. A chance to... finally get stronger.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Kim Gongja had died. And in doing so, he had truly begun to live.

summary: Kim Gongja, a low-ranking F-Class cleaner in the Tower, envies the SSS-Class Flame Emperor. Desperate for power, he accidentally awakens a unique skill, 'I Want To Live', which allows him to return 24 hours prior to his death. His first death, at the hands of the Flame Emperor, reveals the terrifying and exhilarating power of his new ability.
